description: baseline: faithful Python port of einvoice.js from A1-Localization-RU. 2026 tax reform: base rate 20%->22%. Allowed issuance rates [0, 10, 22]. 18 cases x 3 fields (ok, error_count, error_codes). Inlined validateInn/isValidKpp from inn.js + roundRub from money.js + ratesFor from vat.js for self-containment per framework's 3-file pattern. First run hit 55.56 (test data had net=10000/vatAmount=4400 which the validator's 'vatAmount = net*rate/100' check rejected); fixed test data (vatAmount=2200) to match the JS reference's actual contract.
